What We Do

Complete Roofing Services

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, we deliver workmanship you can rely on for decades to come.

Full Re-Roofs

Complete strip and re-tile with modern membranes, batten upgrades and quality concrete or clay tiles built to last 60+ years.

Chimney Work

Repointing, rebuilds, flashings and pot replacement. We restore chimneys properly so they last and stay watertight.

Leadwork

Code 4 and code 5 lead flashings, valleys, soakers and stepped detail. Traditional craftsmanship done right first time.

Roof Repairs

Slipped tiles, leaks, broken ridges and storm damage. Fast call-outs and honest pricing — no upsell, just sorted.

Fascias & Soffits

UPVC fascia, soffit and guttering installations. Tidy, weatherproof finishes that lift the look of the whole property.

Flat Roofing

GRP fibreglass, EPDM rubber and felt systems for extensions, garages and dormers — fully bonded and built to last.

Why Coburn Roofing

Built On Quality.
Backed By Trust.

We're a local roofing company that treats every job like it's our own home. No cutting corners, no surprise costs — just clean, properly executed work.

Whether it's a small repair or a full re-roof, you'll get the same attention to detail and same straight-talking service.

01

Honest Pricing

Free, no-obligation quotes with clear breakdowns. What we quote is what you pay.

02

Quality Materials

We use trusted brands like Redland, Marley and Russell roof tiles — not cheap alternatives.

03

Local Reputation

Built on word-of-mouth across Nottingham, Derby and Mansfield. Most of our work comes from referrals.

04

Tidy Job Site

We respect your home. Scaffolding handled, mess cleared, driveways protected. Left as we found it.
